selectionStrategy: Mix of AI News flagship series, tool roundups (high motion-graphics density), tutorials, and 2 shorts. Bias toward videos shorter than 30 minutes to keep download/extract cycles tractable while still covering Matt's full motion-graphics vocabulary.
